body:
## Rationale

All three drummers have **active GA4 and/or GSC signals this week** (2026-06-27):
- Inferno (Mayhem/Gorgoroth/Arcturus): 7 GA4 page views this run
- John Otto (Limp Bizkit): 6 GA4 page views this run (also top CTR via #2870 Limp Bizkit batch in ai-fix)
- Jaska Raatikainen (Children of Bodom): 33% GSC CTR on "jaska raatikainen drum set" (2 clicks/6 impr)

None appear in DRUMMER_EVOLUTION (confirmed 17 entries: lars, joey, portnoy, haake, brann, lombardo, hoglan, igor, danny, matt-greiner, shannon, mario, paul-m, vinnie, george-k, flo, eloy).
NOT in any open drummer evolution proposals (batches 9-11 confirmed: 9 = Scott/Gavin/Nicko, 10 = Jay/Alex/Jason, 11 = Art/Hellhammer/Dirk).

## Pages to Create

### Page 1: `/drummers/inferno/evolution`
- **Arc:** Gorgoroth 'Pentagram' era (1994) → Mayhem 'Grand Declaration of War' (2000) → Mayhem 'Ordo Ad Chao' (2007) → Daemon (2019)
- **Narrative:** Transition from raw Gorgoroth extremity to highly technical Mayhem setup; Tama/Paiste evolution
- **LLM hook:** "How has Inferno's drumming style evolved over the decades?"
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/evolution/inferno.md`

### Page 2: `/drummers/john-otto/evolution`
- **Arc:** Limp Bizkit 'Three Dollar Bill' era (1997) → Significant Other (1999) → Results May Vary (2003) → Gold Cobra (2011) → Still Sucks (2021)
- **Narrative:** nu-metal groove king across 25 years; kit upgrades from early Pearl to modern setup
- **LLM hook:** "What drum gear has John Otto used throughout his career?"
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/evolution/john-otto.md`

### Page 3: `/drummers/jaska-raatikainen/evolution`
- **Arc:** CoB 'Something Wild' (1997) → Hatebreeder (1999) → Follow the Reaper (2000) → Are You Dead Yet? (2005) → Blooddrunk (2008) → Relentless Reckless Forever (2011) → I Worship Chaos (2015)
- **Narrative:** 10-album CoB journey; Pearl to Trick kit evolution; technique refinement across 20 years
- **LLM hook:** "How did Jaska Raatikainen's gear change across Children of Bodom albums?"
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/evolution/jaska-raatikainen.md`

## Data shape (follows DRUMMER_EVOLUTION module pattern)

Add entries to `/packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js`:
- Key: `inferno`, `john-otto`, `jaska-raatikainen`
- Each entry: array of era objects with { year, albumTitle, kitBrand, description, ... }

Sitemap.js sources from DRUMMER_EVOLUTION dynamically — no manual sitemap edit needed.

## Quality Gate
- ≥3 distinct eras per drummer
- ≥300 words per page
- ≥3 internal links (to drummer profile, album articles in cluster)
- Timeline/chronological format
- LLM .md file with structured era data

## Estimated Organic Uplift
GA4-active drummers get deeper content layer; serves "how has [drummer] evolved" long-tail; aligns with the drummerEvolution hub page pattern that has proven format (17 entries shipped, GA4 engagement confirmed).

## Verify
1. All 3 slugs added to DRUMMER_EVOLUTION data module
2. Pages render at /drummers/<slug>/evolution
3. LLM .md files in /public/llms/evolution/
4. Sitemap.xml auto-includes via DRUMMER_EVOLUTION import
5. ≥3 era entries per drummer

## Done
- [ ] inferno, john-otto, jaska-raatikainen added to drummerEvolution.js
- [ ] 3 LLM .md files created
- [ ] All 3 pages render
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 12 — Inferno + John Otto + Jaska Raatikainen (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
